summary: Base W11 (~20 mpw, §4.C) — 3rd post-deload step-up under the permanent Tue-lift / Wed-T / Thu-off template (Adj #92). Cardio: Mon 40 min + 8 hill strides @ 4.5% (up from W10's 7 within §2.A's 6–8 range); Wed shifts to 5×6 min @ T cruise intervals (1 min rec) — different shape than W10's 2×15; Fri 40 min + 6 strides; Sat 65 min long (up from W10's 60). Lift carry-forwards into this week: incline 145 hold, +5→150 only on a cleaner set-3 RIR (Adj #107); rear-delt 130 bump landed, hold (Adj #112); DB lat 30 hold both slots — Sat is bump-eligible if Adj #117's within-band spread repeats. Open bump gates: Tue preacher 65 cleared at 4×10 (Adj #109) but Sat-slot 65 still failed at 4×12 (Adj #118); Tue pushdown 22.5 re-attempt continues, pain-gated, §10.A 4-wk clock still reset (Adj #110/#119); Sat lat pulldown 160 hold-until-clean (Adj #115); Sat chest-supp row 75 rebuilding headroom (Adj #116); Sat seated calf 345 re-attempt gated on a clean-AM read on the lift day itself (Adj #120/#124). Tendons: L Achilles reactive — Wed T in Zoom Fly 6, easy/long in Vomero (Adj #34); right patellar watch (Adj #64). T pace nudge stays 7:50–7:55/mi (Adj #77/#93); formal recalibration defers to next week's W12 5K-TT (§10). Always-ask at logging: fed/fasted + AM Achilles/knee/SI (Adj #123).

days.note: Step up from W10's 7×@4.5% within §2.A 6–8 range (Adj #106). HR ≤155, cadence 165–172 easy / 175–182 strides.

Incline 145 hold (+5→150 only on cleaner set-3, Adj #107); DB lat 30 hold 6 sets (Adj #108); preacher 65 re-attempt at Tue 4×10 (Adj #109); pushdown 22.5 re-attempt, pain-gated (Adj #110/#119); rear-delt 130 hold (Adj #112); decline crunch BW hold (Adj #111/#122).

days.session: Threshold 5×6 min @ T (1 min rec) cruise intervals
days.note: T pace 7:50–7:55/mi (Adj #77/#93), anchor by RPE ≤7; Zoom Fly 6, watch L Achilles (Adj #34/#113). Different shape than W10's 2×15.
Permanent off (Adj #92) — mobility / walk + daily SI prehab.
Base W11 Fri = easy + strides (§4.C); VO2max doesn't start until W13. Strides flat per §2.A — hill strides Mon-only.

days.session: Long Z1 65 min + Hyp B (PM, ≥6h gap)
days.note: Lift: lat pulldown 160 hold-until-clean (Adj #115); chest-supp row 75 (Adj #116); DB lat Sat 30 bump-eligible if Adj #117 spread repeats; preacher hold 60 (next 65 needs RIR 1-2 set 1, Adj #118); pushdown 22.5 continues; seated calf 345 re-attempt gated on clean AM lift-day report (Adj #120); chest fly 130 (Adj #121); decline crunch BW.
Tyler twists 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1 pyramid, daily SI prehab. Walking fine.
